function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"requirements": [{"title": "Hello endpoint returns JSON greeting", "description": "The /hello endpoint must return a JSON object with a 'message' field containing a greeting string. The response must have Content-Type application/json and return HTTP 200.", "capability_name": "hello-endpoint", "acceptance_criteria": ["GET /hello returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type application/json", "the JSON response body has a 'message' field whose value is a greeting string"]}, {"title": "Goodbye endpoint returns JSON farewell", "description": "The /goodbye endpoint must return a JSON object with a 'message' field containing a farewell string. The response must have Content-Type application/json and return HTTP 200.", "capability_name": "goodbye-endpoint", "acceptance_criteria": ["GET /goodbye returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type application/json", "the JSON response body has a 'message' field whose value is a farewell string"]}, {"title": "UI displays messages from API endpoints", "description": "The frontend must fetch from both /hello and /goodbye endpoints and display the returned messages in the HTML page. Error states should be handled gracefully.", "capability_name": "ui-integration", "depends_on": ["Hello endpoint returns JSON greeting", "Goodbye endpoint returns JSON farewell"], "acceptance_criteria": ["the page issues fetches to both /hello and /goodbye on load", "both returned messages render in the HTML page", "a failed fetch shows a graceful error state rather than a blank page"]}]}
